$comment: Baseline matrix evidence snapshot for release-verify.mjs. Each entry pins the expected HTTP status code per probe per (profile, role_slug) cell as seen in the last GREEN matrix Playwright sweep. release-verify diffs the current run's test-evidence/<date>/<profile>/<role>/probes.json against this snapshot; any drift turns the verdict AMBER. To re-baseline after an intentional role-gate change: run `pnpm run release:verify` and copy the contents of `release-evidence/<date>/matrix-snapshot.json` over this file, then re-run and confirm GREEN.
